title: 'Height of Irresponsibility': Inside the Defence Nightmare If China or Russia Secretly Hold UAP Technology
description: Washington Forum speakers warn that China and Russia may be racing to reverse-engineer UAP technology. Experts label the lack of a US policy a critical national security failure.

title: UFO Disclosure Forum Reveals Secret Recording of 1952 'Invasion of Washington' Exists and Could Soon Be Made Public
description: A recording of a 1952 Air Force briefing on the 'Invasion of Washington' UFO incidents may soon be released, potentially offering new insights into this historic event.

title: ‘Where are the aliens?’: Brazilian psychic responds after viral World Cup UFO abduction frenzy
description: A viral alien prediction collides with reality as Brazil’s match passes quietly, leaving one psychic to explain the internet’s wildest World Cup moment.

title: Pentagon UFO Insider Vanished After Trying To Walk Away, Bombshell Memo Claims | WATCH
description: Did America's alleged ‘UFO gatekeeper’ try to walk away from one of the Pentagon's most secretive programs before mysteriously disappearing? A bombshell memo claims retired Air Force Major General William Neil McCasland wanted to resign from classified research projects just days before vanishing without a trace back in February. With links to Project Blue Book, Wright-Patterson Air Force Base, and decades of UFO secrecy, his disappearance has reignited conspiracy theories surrounding extraterrestrials, military cover-ups, and classified Pentagon programs.

title: Suspected UFO Spotted From Canyon Sparks Fresh UAP Debate, US Government Releases Context
description: A video from the US Department of War showing an unidentified object in a canyon has intensified UFO/UAP and alien debates online.
